mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_attendance WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND attendance_date = #{attendanceDate}

SELECT student_id, COUNT(*) as total_days, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'NORMAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as present_days, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'ABSENT' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as absent_days, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'LEAVE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as leave_days, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'LATE' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as late_days FROM t_attendance WHERE class_id = #{classId} AND attendance_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY student_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_attendance ( attendance_id, student_id, class_id, kg_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_in_photo, check_out_time, check_out_photo, status, leave_type, leave_reason, pickup_person, pickup_relation, apply_by, approve_by, approve_time, approve_status ) VALUES ( #{attendanceId}, #{studentId}, #{classId}, #{kgId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkInPhoto}, #{checkOutTime}, #{checkOutPhoto}, #{status}, #{leaveType}, #{leaveReason}, #{pickupPerson}, #{pickupRelation}, #{applyBy}, #{approveBy}, #{approveTime}, #{approveStatus} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_attendance SET check_in_time = #{checkInTime}, check_in_photo = #{checkInPhoto}, check_out_time = #{checkOutTime}, check_out_photo = #{checkOutPhoto}, status = #{status}, leave_type = #{leaveType}, leave_reason = #{leaveReason}, pickup_person = #{pickupPerson}, pickup_relation = #{pickupRelation} WHERE attendance_id = #{attendanceId}
